title: Converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL with confidence
summary: Google Cloud's Gemini AI serves as a tutor for converting T-SQL database code to PL/pgSQL. The tool explains conversion logic, including refactoring procedures into Common Table Expressions, to help developers migrate applications to PostgreSQL on Google Cloud.
writeup: This video shows how Google Cloud's Gemini acts as a tutor for migrating database code from T-SQL to PL/pgSQL, the procedural language used by PostgreSQL on Google Cloud. Rather than just outputting converted code, Gemini explains the conversion logic, including how to refactor stored procedures into Common Table Expressions. The result is a migration workflow where developers understand the reasoning behind each change instead of trusting opaque output, which matters for moving applications onto PostgreSQL with confidence.
